# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart that includes an Ingress resource for our application. Configure the ingress to accept traffic from any hostname for flexibility across different environments (dev, staging, prod). We'll configure TLS certificates later when we move to production.

Prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: my-app
description: A Helm chart for my application
type: application
version: 0.1.0

dependencies: []

templates:
  deployment.yaml:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    metadata:
      name: {{ .Release.Name }}-deployment
      labels:
        app: {{ .Release.Name }}
    spec:
      replicas: 1
      selector:
        matchLabels:
          app: {{ .Release.Name }}
      template:
        metadata:
          labels:
            app: {{ .Release.Name }}
        spec:
          containers:
            - name: {{ .Release.Name }}
              image: "my-app-image:latest"
              securityContext:
                runAsUser: 1000
                runAsGroup: 3000
                fsGroup: 2000
              ports:
                - containerPort: 80

  service.yaml:
    apiVersion: v1
    kind: Service
    metadata:
      name: {{ .Release.Name }}-service
    spec:
      type: ClusterIP
      ports:
        - port: 80
          targetPort: 80
      selector:
        app: {{ .Release.Name }}

  ingress.yaml:
    apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
    kind: Ingress
    metadata:
      name: {{ .Release.Name }}-ingress
      annotations:
        nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rewrite-target: /
    spec:
      rules:
        - host: "*"
          http:
            paths:
              - path: /
                pathType: Prefix
                backend:
                  service:
                    name: {{ .Release.Name }}-service
                    port:
                      number: 80

values.yaml:
  replicaCount: 1
  image:
    repository: my-app-image
    tag: latest
  service:
    enabled: true
    port: 80
  ingress:
    enabled: true
    annotations: {}
    path: /
    hosts:
      - host: "*"
        paths:
          - /
